triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value (LTV) Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value percentage is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it complies with the maximum allowed for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that LTV must be calculated as (Total Advance) / (Vehicle Trade Price). This value is missing in the proposal, which is necessary to verify compliance with the maximum LTV thresholds for the applicant's credit tier.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income (DTI) Ratio Missing
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income ratio is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it complies with the maximum allowed for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that DTI must be calculated as (Total Monthly Credit Commitments + Proposed Monthly Instalment) / Verified Net Monthly Income. This value is missing in the proposal, which is necessary to verify compliance with the maximum DTI thresholds for the applicant's credit tier.

content.reasoning: The analysis identified missing calculations for Loan-to-Value (LTV) and Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratios, which are critical for assessing compliance with underwriting policies. These omissions prevent a complete evaluation of the proposal's adherence to policy thresholds.
